name: Breakfast Burritos Anytime
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large nonstick skillet, cook the hash browns in oil as package directs. Season with salt.
2. In a medium skillet over medium heat, break up and cook the sausage until thoroughly cooked, about 5 to 7 minutes. Drain any excess fat.
3. Add the eggs (or egg substitute) to the skillet; cook and stir until the eggs are set.
4. To serve, spoon the hash browns and sausage mixture down the center of each tortilla, dividing equally. Fold the sides over and secure with picks.
5. Serve with salsa.
Menu: Bell Pepper and Carrot Sticks, Broiled Grapefruit Halves Drizzled with Maple Syrup
Nutritional Information Per Serving: 740 calories; 47 g fat; 255 mg cholesterol; 840 mg sodium; 63 g carbohydrate; 3 g fiber; 24 g protein.
